channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Anthropic is having a moment in the private markets; SpaceX could spoil the party
item.description: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's looming IPO poised to reshape the landscape for everyone.

item.title: Lucid blames dip in Q1 sales on seat supplier issue
item.description: Lucid said it has resolved the problem and is not changing its guidance for 2026.
